title: kingidium deliciosum var. bellum
intro: Kingidium deliciosum var. bellum, also known as the Bell's Kingidium, is a variety of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its striking white and green flowers with yellow markings. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Kingidium deliciosum var. bellum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
